question: Sometimes I think about hurting myself so the pain in my head will stop.
I keep imagining not waking up and it feels like a relief.
Sometimes I wish I could disappear so no one has to see me anymore.
When I get yelled at, I feel like hurting myself on purpose.
At night I lie in bed thinking about ways to end everything.
Sometimes I hit myself when I feel like I did everything wrong.
I press my nails into my skin until it really hurts because I feel so bad.
Sometimes I wish I would get sick or hurt so I do not have to go on.
I have thought about taking a lot of pills so I do not have to feel anything.
Sometimes I imagine walking into the road and not moving out of the way.
When I am alone, I think about cutting myself just to feel something.
Sometimes I skip eating on purpose because I feel like I should not be here.
I wrote in my journal that I do not want to live anymore and meant it.
Sometimes I wish something bad would happen to me so I do not have to choose it.
I feel like I deserve to be hurt when I make mistakes.
Sometimes I take more medicine than I should because I do not care what happens.
I keep looking up ways to hurt myself when I feel overwhelmed.
Sometimes I imagine jumping from a high place so I do not have to feel this anymore.
When things go wrong, I think about ending everything instead of fixing it.
Sometimes I hold my breath on purpose to see how close I can get to passing out.
I have hidden sharp things in my room because I thought I might use them on myself.
Sometimes I wish a car would hit me so my problems would be over.
When I feel ashamed, I think about scratching myself until I bleed.
Sometimes I imagine falling from somewhere high and not getting back up.
I feel like hurting myself would show people how bad I am feeling inside.
My friend keeps saying they wish they were not alive, what should I do?
